commands.review_summary:
The branch adds registration-time cleanup for dead or expired native-hook relay bridge JSON files and regression tests for pruning stale foreign records while preserving live or unknown-liveness records.

PR surface: Source +59, Tests +148. Total +207 across 2 files.

Reproducibility: yes. source-reproducible with strong linked live proof. Current main and v2026.5.27 do not prune stale bridge files at registration, while the source PR describes a real WSL2/systemd setup where dead bridge records blocked native tool calls before the patch and succeeded afterward.
commands.review_followup: - A contributor explicitly stopped ClawSweeper automation, and the remaining action is maintainer review of the compatibility/availability boundary plus exact-head check completion.

target.title: fix(native-hook-relay): prune stale bridge files on registration
